ops.body: Track P closed (2026-07-19). Shipped green: cc-pool 4e1050a (daemonkit migration: import flip + consumer-owned stamps + daemonPeer takeover with SO_PEERCRED pid + takeover-wide proto tolerance + drain.Simple settle-before-cancel + KeepAlive SuccessfulExit=false) + b13657c (widget release-collapse onto release-app.yml@v1 with the assert_script gate) + d9edb3d (push-CI greening). cc-notes needed no flip. Rehearsals: rc1 exposed the xcconfig stub gap, rc2 exposed the callee's showBuildSettings-never-downloads-profiles bug (fixed in homebrew-tap edaf80f: build first, validate embedded profiles post-build), rc3 FULLY GREEN — release-app signing/notarize/assert pipeline proven, cask correctly excluded for prerelease. Eviction rewrite survived its own sol refuter round (cross-proto tolerance, sync-drain admission, OpShutdown ACK on s.wg, live-incumbent ladder E2E). Remaining adjacencies live in handoff doc 2ff9caf: observed live upgrade, real-release cask publish (#17), design-note 7b7a53f already rewritten.
